nasb.text: So Miriam was shut up outside the camp for seven days, and the people did not move on until Miriam was received again.

esv.text: So Miriam was shut outside the camp seven days, and the people did not set out on the march till Miriam was brought in again.

cnv.text: 於是米利暗被關在營外七天；人民沒有啟程，直到把米利暗接回來。

ccb.text: 于是，米利暗被关在营外七天，民众等她回营后才继续前行。
